  1. Home

Our 2026 season is officially open and we are shipping weekly

Click Here For Our Current Calendar of Availability 

We ship to every state in the United States as well as Alaska, Hawaii and Puerto Rico!

Please note: we have a 10 chick shipping minimum to ensure safe arrival from Feb-June 1st. After June 1st that shipping minimum drops to 6 chicks. Starting Oct 1st the minimum goes back up to 10 chicks.  Any orders that do not have that shipping minimum will have free male azure or alchemist blue males included for the safety of your chicks.

There are no minimum orders when picking up your chicks

We ship exclusively on Tuesdays and offer pickups from the farm on Tuesday, Wednesday, Saturday each week.

Need help ordering? This video for Shipping and this one for Pickup will answer your questions.

For farm updates throughout the year you can stay in touch with us by joining out email list. 

Follow This Link For a Complete List of Our Recommended Chick and Hen Rearing Supplies

Please view our video below for our special requirements for successful chick shipping from us to you.

  • Treats for Chickens 2 Products

About Alchemist Farm

We are a small family farm team headed up by Franchesca & Ryan Duval along with our two children in Northern California.  We are pioneers of humane breeding and hatching, no male chicks are killed on our farm as they are at large scale hatcheries and all of our breeding groups are free to roam on their separate pastures.
